$comment: Derived from Claude Code production source: src/types/permissions.ts PermissionDecision type
title: Olympus Hook Response Schema
description: Structured response format for olympus hooks, ported from Claude Code's PermissionDecision<Input> type (PermissionAllowDecision | PermissionAskDecision | PermissionDenyDecision)

updatedInput.description: Optional modified input to pass to the tool (mirrors PermissionAllowDecision.updatedInput)

additionalContext.description: Feedback text injected into the conversation as context

message.description: Reason for denial, shown to the LLM

oneOf.title: AskDecision
oneOf.description: Ported from: PermissionAskDecision<Input> (src/types/permissions.ts:199-226). Prompts the user for approval.

suggestions.description: Ported from: PermissionUpdate[] — suggested permission rule changes

decisionReason.description: Ported from: PermissionDecisionReason (src/types/permissions.ts:271-324). Tracks WHY a decision was made.

type.description: Decision source. 'rule'/'hook'/'mode' from Claude Code. 'gate'/'contract'/'evidence'/'calibration'/'spawn'/'da-required'/'consensus-required' are olympus extensions.

rule.description: The specific rule that matched (for type=rule)

hookName.description: The hook that made this decision (for type=hook)

gate.description: The gate that was evaluated (for type=gate)
